items.title_en: Why US community banks say the GENIUS Act has a stablecoin loophole
items.title_ur: Why US community banks say the GENIUS Act has a stablecoin loophole
summary_en: Why US community banks say the GENIUS Act has a stablecoin loophole
Banks argue that stablecoin rewards offered through exchanges exploit a GENIUS Act loophole, blurring the line between payment tokens and savings accounts.
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.

items.title_en: Rhode Island Reintroduces Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Second Straight Year
items.title_ur: Rhode Island Reintroduces Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Second Straight Year
summary_en: Rhode Island Reintroduces Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Second Straight Year

Bitcoin Magazine Rhode Island Reintroduces Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Second Straight Year Rhode Island lawmakers have reintroduced a temporary Bitcoin tax exemption bill that would eliminate state income and capital gains taxes on small Bitcoin transactions — up to $20,000 annually.
This post Rhode Island Reintroduces Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Second Straight Year first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman .
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.
summary_ur: Rhode Island Reintroduces Bitcoin Tax Exemption Bill for Second Straight Year

items.title_en: Bitcoin climbs to two-month high of $96,240 as altcoins surge and shorts get squeezed
items.title_ur: Bitcoin climbs to two-month high of $96,240 as altcoins surge and shorts get squeezed
summary_en: Bitcoin climbs to two-month high of $96,240 as altcoins surge and shorts get squeezed
Bitcoin climbed above $96,000 for the first time since November, triggering over $500 million in liquidations as altcoins outperformed and traders rushed to cover bearish bets.
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.

items.title_en: Strive tumbles 12% as reverse stock split stumps investors despite Semler acquisition
items.title_ur: Strive tumbles 12% as reverse stock split stumps investors despite Semler acquisition
summary_en: Strive tumbles 12% as reverse stock split stumps investors despite Semler acquisition
Upon completion, the combined firm would hold nearly 13,000 BTC, surpassing the holdings of Tesla and Trump Media & Technology Group.
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.

summary_en: Senate's Warren: WLFI-tied bank application should be halted until Trump divests
Government-ethics questions still hang over the U.S.
Senate's plans to vote on the crypto market structure bill, and Warren is raising a related argument.
Watch market reaction and follow-up official updates.
